title: Add co-simulation in sim pass
body:
- support FST as output for sim pass
- "n" parameter now explicitly use clock cycles
- new parameter "r" to use FST as input for co-simulation
- "sim", "sim-cmp", "sim-gate" and "sim-gold" to select co-simulation mode
- "start","stop" or "at" parameter to specify time (default unit is ns, can use anything from zs to s)
- "scope" to specify top scope in input sim file
